title: PAYMENT_ACCOUNT const steals dispatch_payment's opening rustdoc paragraph
description: Trigger: const PAYMENT_ACCOUNT was inserted into the middle of dispatch_payment's multi-paragraph doc comment. In Rust, /// lines before an item attach to that item. Result: PAYMENT_ACCOUNT's rustdoc reads 'Route an incoming ClearMessage::Payment to the correct session handler. ZIP-32 account index...' — the first sentence describes dispatch_payment, not the const. dispatch_payment loses its opening paragraph. cargo doc generates wrong documentation for both items. Fix: move PAYMENT_ACCOUNT before the dispatch_payment doc block entirely, giving it its own standalone doc comment.
